{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Indirial's tattoos
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Indirial]] has tattooed chains snaking up his arms.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c23">''House of Blades'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
